card_name_verified: American Express Blue Business Cash™ Card
_review_reason: $0 AF no-frills business cash-back card. No recurring annual credits — value comes purely from 2% cash back (capped at $50k/year then 1%). Confirmed: 'card itself doesn't feature annual recurring benefit credits like travel credits or merchant category credits—instead, it relies on its straightforward cash-back earning structure'.
_excluded: 2% cash back on first $50k purchases (earning rate)
